_note: Fleet baseline decided 2026-07-01 (repo-ops consumers matrix §3a / roadmap §2.1): squash-only merges, squash source PR_TITLE/PR_BODY, auto-merge + delete-branch-on-merge on, Actions default token permissions read, can_approve_pull_request_reviews off. Consumer projects copy this file to their own docs/runbooks/ and use it as the --settings input to `check-repo-settings.mjs` / `platform-sync.mjs --check-settings`. Do not hand-edit the values without updating the operator decision record in docs/decisions.md.
